scenario.key_phrase: I failed last year and must crack it this time

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Namaste, this is Priya from PhysicsWallah sales team. Am I speaking with Harsh?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan ji, yes this is Harsh speaking.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great! Thank you for your time Harsh. I'm calling regarding your interest in our NEET courses. Can you tell me a bit about yourself - which class are you currently in?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Actually, I'm a dropper right now. I gave NEET last year but didn't clear it.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Oh I see, dropper student. That's completely fine Harsh, many of our successful students are droppers. So you're preparing for NEET 2025 then?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, exactly. I failed last year and must crack it this time. Can't afford to waste another year.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul samajh sakti hun. The pressure is real for dropper students. How much time do you have left for your exam preparation?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Around 6 months are left. That's why I'm looking for a structured course now.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect timing Harsh! 6 months is good enough if you have the right guidance. For dropper students like you, we have NEET Sankalp 2027 - it's specifically designed for repeat aspirants. Have you heard about it?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: No, I haven't. What's special about this Sankalp batch?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great question! Sankalp is our premium dropper batch with intensive revision modules, previous year analysis, and most importantly - psychological support for dropper students. It addresses the specific challenges you face.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: That sounds good. What about the fees structure? I need to know the investment required.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Sure Harsh. NEET Sankalp 2027 is priced at ₹44,999. But here's the good news - we offer 0% EMI through PW Pay starting at just ₹4,499 per month. That's less than what most families spend on daily chai!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: ₹4,499 per month sounds manageable. What all is included in this course exactly?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Excellent! You get complete video lectures, live doubt sessions, test series, study material, and dedicated dropper mentorship. Plus 24/7 doubt resolution. Everything you need to crack NEET in one package.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: This seems comprehensive. Can I make this decision myself or do I need to discuss with parents first?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's entirely up to you Harsh. Since you're a dropper, I understand you might have more autonomy in these decisions. What do you feel comfortable with?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I can decide this myself. My parents have given me the responsibility since it's my second attempt.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's great to hear! Shows the trust they have in you. Since you have 6 months and the course fits your budget, shall I help you enroll in NEET Sankalp 2027 today?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, I think this is the right course for me. How do we proceed with the enrollment?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Wonderful Harsh! I'll share the enrollment link on your WhatsApp right after this call. You can complete the payment through PW Pay EMI option. Your NEET journey starts today!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Perfect Priya. Thank you for explaining everything so clearly. I'm feeling confident about this decision.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: You're most welcome Harsh! I'm sure with dedication and our Sankalp batch, you'll definitely crack NEET this time. All the best for your preparation!
